---
agent: 'agent'
description: 'Audit the Sales Note sales management system repository and create AGENT_PLAN.md without changing production code'
---

Audit this repository as a Korean sales reporting / sales management system.

This is NOT a bio distributor website.
This is NOT a public marketing homepage.

Read first:
- .github/copilot-instructions.md
- AGENTS.md
- PRODUCT_BRIEF.md
- SALES_NOTE_SPEC.md
- SECURITY_PRIVACY_CHECKLIST.md
- QA_CHECKLIST.md
- README or project docs
- package/build/test configuration

Do not modify production code yet.

Create or update AGENT_PLAN.md.

AGENT_PLAN.md must include:

1. Detected tech stack
2. App structure
3. Routing/URL structure
4. Models/data structure
5. Views/controllers/pages
6. Templates/components
7. Forms and validation
8. Authentication/authorization flow
9. Existing dashboard/report/customer/opportunity/schedule/quote features
10. Current security/privacy observations
11. UX gaps for sales reps
12. UX gaps for sales managers
13. Data consistency risks
14. Recommended phased implementation plan
15. Files likely to be changed
16. Validation commands

Focus on:
- Login/auth flow
- Dashboard
- Sales reports
- Customer management
- Opportunities/pipeline
- Schedule/tasks
- Quotes/contracts
- Search/filter/list usability
- Mobile usability
- Security/privacy
